outcomes: Reduced repetitive PM effort across market research, PRD drafting, project review, and task decomposition, with time savings measurable through weekly review and ticket creation cycles
Turned PRD, Schema, Vocabulary, and SDK specifications into version-controlled assets in GitHub, making product decisions traceable and reviewable
projects.summary: For the TVBS Rich Data project, I designed an AI-assisted, human-governed product workflow that integrates AI into market sensing, product specification, planning-to-execution handoff, project execution, and behavior labeling validation. AI supported trend monitoring, Schema / Vocabulary design, SDK logic exploration, and PRD drafting, while GitHub and Claude Code were used to turn versioned product specs into traceable ticket / issue drafts. The workflow keeps the PM as the decision owner, using CLAUDE.md, GitHub version control, and labeling accuracy thresholds to ensure that AI outputs remain reviewable, correctable, and tied to product iteration.
projects.title: AI-Native Workflow for Rich Data Product Development
